hero.title: Anantya 2026
hero.subtitle: A Grand Celebration
hero.tagline: Celebrate the divine — A day of culture, devotion & joy

janmashtami.title: About Anantya
janmashtami.content: Anantya is one of the most joyously celebrated festivals. It marks a beautiful day of culture and devotion. The festival is celebrated with great devotion through bhajans, performances, and joyful traditions. It is a time to reflect on love, devotion, and eternal truth.

event.title: About the Event
event.content: We are delighted to host Anantya 2026 — a vibrant celebration bringing together students from all departments to honour this auspicious occasion. Open to all students, the event features cultural performances, traditional competitions, devotional programs, exciting games, and delicious prasadam. Whether you're a performer, a volunteer, or simply wish to celebrate, there is a place for you here. Come join us in making this Anantya unforgettable!

gamePage.uriyadiDesc: Uriyadi is a beautiful tradition honoring Lord Krishna's mischievous childhood act of breaking hanging earthen pots to steal fresh butter (Makhan). It symbolizes his playful, divine energy and the joy of coming together to overcome challenges.
gamePage.noRegistration: No registration is needed to enjoy this event. Feel free to come, watch, and cheer as we recreate this joyful pastime of Lord Krishna!
gamePage.signUpQuickly: Sign up for this event quickly! Slots are filling up.
